chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D - 1570 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ 1) For orders on office objection. 2) For hearing of CMA No.7870/2025. 3) For hearing of Main Case. 30.09.2025. None present. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Nasir/
